query:
-- Bestehende Match-Daten in neue Spalten kopieren
UPDATE matches SET 
  type = matchType,
  player1_id = team1Player1Id,
  player2_id = team1Player2Id,
  player3_id = team2Player1Id,
  player4_id = team2Player2Id,
  winning_side = CASE WHEN winner = 'team1' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END,
  played_at = UNIX_TIMESTAMP(playedAt) * 1000,
  new_created_at = UNIX_TIMESTAMP(createdAt) * 1000
WHERE type IS NULL;

-- match_sets: team1Score/team2Score in neue Spalten kopieren
UPDATE match_sets SET score_team1 = team1Score, score_team2 = team2Score WHERE score_team1 IS NULL;

-- seasons: isActive in is_active kopieren, createdAt in created_at
UPDATE seasons SET is_active = isActive, created_at = UNIX_TIMESTAMP(createdAt) * 1000 WHERE created_at = 0;

-- players: createdAt in created_at kopieren
UPDATE players SET created_at = UNIX_TIMESTAMP(createdAt) * 1000 WHERE created_at = 0;
